item.title: ナンテン まだ赤い実にはなっていないけれど、実がついてきました🫒 （暑くて何載せようか何も考えてなくて適当に選んで…

item.title: #青空ごはん部 #入院中病院食 【 日本歴代第六位 】 猛暑 お見舞い申し上げます 🫒 京都の気温は３９.３℃ …
item.author: 園芸の狼 (@gardeningwerewolf.bsky.social)
item.description:
#青空ごはん部
#入院中病院食

【 日本歴代第六位 】

猛暑 お見舞い申し上げます 🫒

京都の気温は３９.３℃
観光どころじゃありませんなァ 🫒

愛知県豊田市では４０.８℃
そして静岡県佐久間では日本歴代六位タイ記録となる４１.１℃ を記録、とうとう一線を越えて来ました … 🫒
みなさまも暑気あたりには充分にお気を付けを … 🙇🫒

さてさて、リハビリ体操は自転車運動のペダリングをハードの設定で二十分間、ちょっぴり脚力が付いたみたいで、昨日よりスムーズにヤり遂げました 🫒

明日も無理せず頑張ってチカラを蓄えてゆきたいと思います… 😆🫒

(何故かお昼ご飯の画像ファイルが開かない …)
item.content:encoded:
#青空ごはん部
#入院中病院食

【 日本歴代第六位 】

猛暑 お見舞い申し上げます 🫒

京都の気温は３９.３℃
観光どころじゃありませんなァ 🫒

愛知県豊田市では４０.８℃
そして静岡県佐久間では日本歴代六位タイ記録となる４１.１℃ を記録、とうとう一線を越えて来ました … 🫒
みなさまも暑気あたりには充分にお気を付けを … 🙇🫒

さてさて、リハビリ体操は自転車運動のペダリングをハードの設定で二十分間、ちょっぴり脚力が付いたみたいで、昨日よりスムーズにヤり遂げました 🫒

明日も無理せず頑張ってチカラを蓄えてゆきたいと思います… 😆🫒

(何故かお昼ご飯の画像ファイルが開かない …)

item.title: Runway launches Runway Media Router, which it says is the fi…
item.author: Techmeme (@techmeme.com)
item.description:
Runway launches Runway Media Router, which it says is the first built specifically for generative media, as it expands from AI video to AI infrastructure (Rebecca Bellan/TechCrunch)

item.content:encoded:

item.title: LATEST: Oil surges to $100 a barrel after Iran-backed Houthi…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: LATEST: Oil surges to $100 a barrel after Iran-backed Houthi rebels attack tankers in the Red Sea, threatening an energy bottleneck in another key waterway.
item.content:encoded: LATEST: Oil surges to $100 a barrel after Iran-backed Houthi rebels attack tankers in the Red Sea, threatening an energy bottleneck in another key waterway.

item.title: にゃんぱすー🐈🐾🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧…
item.author: ねこぱすー@sync (@aria-sync.bsky.social)
item.description:
にゃんぱすー🐈🐾🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧
こんばんわ🌙ᩚ✩.*˚
今日は夜勤でぶっ続け昼勤も入るんฅ⸃⸃🐾🐾
今日も一日頑張るぞいو( ˙꒳˙ )٩
#こんばんわ
#イマソラ
#空の向こう
#夜の街並

item.title: こんばんは お疲れ様です 今日も猛暑日 毎日暑い日が続きますね 秋は夏休みの向こう側ですよね 早く夏休み終わらないか…
item.author: 🦀川口 掌🦀 (@kawaguchitenohira.bsky.social)
item.description:
こんばんは
お疲れ様です

今日も猛暑日 毎日暑い日が続きますね 秋は夏休みの向こう側ですよね 早く夏休み終わらないかなぁ と、まるで小学生の母親の様なことを呟きつつ

水分補給🥤にしっかりで熱帯夜を乗り越えましょう(*•̀ㅂ•́)و✧

おやすみなさい🌆
item.content:encoded:
こんばんは
お疲れ様です

今日も猛暑日 毎日暑い日が続きますね 秋は夏休みの向こう側ですよね 早く夏休み終わらないかなぁ と、まるで小学生の母親の様なことを呟きつつ

水分補給🥤にしっかりで熱帯夜を乗り越えましょう(*•̀ㅂ•́)و✧

おやすみなさい🌆

item.title: A growing number of Amazon and gig economy workers earn so l…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: A growing number of Amazon and gig economy workers earn so little that they rely on public assistance to put food on the table and obtain health coverage, a Government Accountability Office study released Wednesday found. https://cnn.it/4wn3Bey
item.content:encoded: A growing number of Amazon and gig economy workers earn so little that they rely on public assistance to put food on the table and obtain health coverage, a Government Accountability Office study released Wednesday found. https://cnn.it/4wn3Bey

item.title: Krista LeRay rediscovered her needlepoint hobby during the C…
item.author: CNBC (@cnbc.com)
item.description: Krista LeRay rediscovered her needlepoint hobby during the Covid-19 pandemic. Now she runs a crafts business that brings in more than $4.4 million per year.
item.content:encoded: Krista LeRay rediscovered her needlepoint hobby during the Covid-19 pandemic. Now she runs a crafts business that brings in more than $4.4 million per year.

item.title: ユーザーの皆さん、こんばんは🌙 今日一日、お仕事や勉強とお疲れ様でした😄 本日は、千代仔ちゃんの投稿に多くの評価をし…
item.author: ｈｉｋｏ１９８１.ｂｓｋｙ.ｓｏｃｉａｌ (@hiko1981.bsky.social)
item.description:
ユーザーの皆さん、こんばんは🌙
今日一日、お仕事や勉強とお疲れ様でした😄
本日は、千代仔ちゃんの投稿に多くの評価をして頂き、ありがとうございます😊そんな皆さんに深く感謝致します。
７月の後半に入り、これからますます厳しい暑い日々が訪れてきますが、そんな暑さに負けずに体調良く元気に過ごしていきましょう。
それでは、明日も良い一日を。おやすみなさい😴
item.content:encoded:
ユーザーの皆さん、こんばんは🌙
今日一日、お仕事や勉強とお疲れ様でした😄
本日は、千代仔ちゃんの投稿に多くの評価をして頂き、ありがとうございます😊そんな皆さんに深く感謝致します。
７月の後半に入り、これからますます厳しい暑い日々が訪れてきますが、そんな暑さに負けずに体調良く元気に過ごしていきましょう。
それでは、明日も良い一日を。おやすみなさい😴

item.title: America’s largest power grid, PJM, is facing a “grave legiti…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: America’s largest power grid, PJM, is facing a “grave legitimacy crisis” and needs to reform, according to Federal Energy Regulatory Commission Chairman Laura Swett.
item.content:encoded: America’s largest power grid, PJM, is facing a “grave legitimacy crisis” and needs to reform, according to Federal Energy Regulatory Commission Chairman Laura Swett.

item.title: トンテキ肉のムニエル風 昨日のトライアルオープンセールでゲットした、 g98円の特売品を 同じく開店セール価格のゴーヤ…
item.author: 101匹足利尊氏 (@wandw.bsky.social)
item.description:
トンテキ肉のムニエル風

昨日のトライアルオープンセールでゲットした、
g98円の特売品を
同じく開店セール価格のゴーヤと共に焼く。

#青空ごはん部 #自炊班
item.content:encoded:
トンテキ肉のムニエル風

昨日のトライアルオープンセールでゲットした、
g98円の特売品を
同じく開店セール価格のゴーヤと共に焼く。

#青空ごはん部 #自炊班

item.title: Gray whales are experiencing a “catastrophic” die-off as the…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Gray whales are experiencing a “catastrophic” die-off as their food supply in the Arctic dwindles, according to experts who say this year’s stranding deaths are already on pace to be among the worst on record.
item.content:encoded: Gray whales are experiencing a “catastrophic” die-off as their food supply in the Arctic dwindles, according to experts who say this year’s stranding deaths are already on pace to be among the worst on record.

item.content:encoded: The lawmakers asked investigators to examine allegations that Kenneth Kies was forced out after raising concerns.

item.title: For centuries, scientists studied what pregnancy does to the…
item.author: MIT Press (@mitpress.bsky.social)
item.description:
For centuries, scientists studied what pregnancy does to the body. Almost nobody studied what it does to the brain. Neuroscientist Susana Carmona helped change that.

Listen to Susana's conversation with Early Childhood Matters (and pre-order her book "A Mother's Brain," out 10/6!):
item.content:encoded:
For centuries, scientists studied what pregnancy does to the body. Almost nobody studied what it does to the brain. Neuroscientist Susana Carmona helped change that.

Listen to Susana's conversation with Early Childhood Matters (and pre-order her book "A Mother's Brain," out 10/6!):

item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)

item.content:encoded:

item.title: 𝙾𝚗𝚕𝚢 𝚠𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚒𝚜 𝚋𝚘𝚛𝚗 𝚏𝚛𝚘𝚖 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚍𝚎𝚙𝚝𝚑𝚜…
item.author: 𝚂𝚝𝚊𝚗𝚍𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝙼𝚘𝚞𝚗𝚝𝚊𝚒𝚗 (@standingmountain.bsky.social)
item.description:
𝙾𝚗𝚕𝚢 𝚠𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚒𝚜 𝚋𝚘𝚛𝚗 𝚏𝚛𝚘𝚖 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚍𝚎𝚙𝚝𝚑𝚜 𝚘𝚏 𝙱𝚎𝚒𝚗𝚐, 𝚌𝚊𝚗 𝚜𝚊𝚝𝚒𝚜𝚏𝚢 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚜𝚘𝚞𝚕..

𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝚜𝚘𝚞𝚕 𝚛𝚎𝚌𝚘𝚐𝚗𝚒𝚣𝚎𝚜 𝚘𝚗𝚕𝚢 𝚠𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚒𝚜 𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚕—
𝙸𝚝 𝚕𝚘𝚗𝚐𝚜 𝚗𝚘𝚝 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚙𝚎𝚛𝚏𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗, 𝚋𝚞𝚝 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚝𝚛𝚞𝚝𝚑.

#LovesAll
item.content:encoded:
𝙾𝚗𝚕𝚢 𝚠𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚒𝚜 𝚋𝚘𝚛𝚗 𝚏𝚛𝚘𝚖 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚍𝚎𝚙𝚝𝚑𝚜 𝚘𝚏 𝙱𝚎𝚒𝚗𝚐, 𝚌𝚊𝚗 𝚜𝚊𝚝𝚒𝚜𝚏𝚢 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚜𝚘𝚞𝚕..

𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝚜𝚘𝚞𝚕 𝚛𝚎𝚌𝚘𝚐𝚗𝚒𝚣𝚎𝚜 𝚘𝚗𝚕𝚢 𝚠𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚒𝚜 𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚕—
𝙸𝚝 𝚕𝚘𝚗𝚐𝚜 𝚗𝚘𝚝 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚙𝚎𝚛𝚏𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗, 𝚋𝚞𝚝 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚝𝚛𝚞𝚝𝚑.

#LovesAll

item.title: Ashley believes her ex-husband should have never had access …
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description: Ashley believes her ex-husband should have never had access to a weapon in a personal capacity, much less in an official one: “He does not belong in careers that involve guns.”
item.content:encoded: Ashley believes her ex-husband should have never had access to a weapon in a personal capacity, much less in an official one: “He does not belong in careers that involve guns.”

So proud of her ❤️

item.title: Morning 😂, ready to be shipped.

item.title: Good morning. Balance in the symbiotic relationships of life…
item.author: Climb To The Clouds (@climbtotheclouds.bsky.social)
item.description:
Good morning.
Balance in the symbiotic relationships of life are what give us the energy to fly, the necessities to endure.
I hope you have a great day.
#imageandverse #bees #photography #bloomscrolling #flowers #insects #pollinators #ECK #EastCoastKin #mygarden
item.content:encoded:
Good morning.
Balance in the symbiotic relationships of life are what give us the energy to fly, the necessities to endure.
I hope you have a great day.
#imageandverse #bees #photography #bloomscrolling #flowers #insects #pollinators #ECK #EastCoastKin #mygarden

item.title: There was a little kid in aqua shoes and carrying a shrimp n…
item.author: Corrinne F (@traviata.bsky.social)
item.description: There was a little kid in aqua shoes and carrying a shrimp net on the Falmouth train. He spent the whole journey from Truro breathlessly describing his day and his plans for the beach to his mum, the train guard and anyone else who would listen. Let’s hear it for enthusiasm!
item.content:encoded: There was a little kid in aqua shoes and carrying a shrimp net on the Falmouth train. He spent the whole journey from Truro breathlessly describing his day and his plans for the beach to his mum, the train guard and anyone else who would listen. Let’s hear it for enthusiasm!

item.title: the whole "women's sports exist to protect women from men" f…
item.author: nude antifa goat (@goat.sex)
item.description:
the whole "women's sports exist to protect women from men" framing is hilarious, given that a lot of these divisions were initially formed because men were deeply embarrassed any time a woman beat them at a sport

olympic shooting was mixed gender right up until a woman won the gold
item.content:encoded:
the whole "women's sports exist to protect women from men" framing is hilarious, given that a lot of these divisions were initially formed because men were deeply embarrassed any time a woman beat them at a sport

olympic shooting was mixed gender right up until a woman won the gold

item.title: LATEST: Iran-backed Houthi militants say they have struck tw…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: LATEST: Iran-backed Houthi militants say they have struck two tankers in the Red Sea, risking another bottleneck that could further disrupt global energy supplies.
item.content:encoded: LATEST: Iran-backed Houthi militants say they have struck two tankers in the Red Sea, risking another bottleneck that could further disrupt global energy supplies.
